action_text: Open the field selector in the filter builder
rationale: We need to build a filter condition; first step is selecting the field. Opening the “-- choose field --” combobox should let us pick “Short description.”

action_text: Open the “Short description” column options menu
rationale: Using the column header options often provides filtering actions (e.g., Filter, Show Matching). Opening the Short description header menu may allow setting a “contains” filter.
The per-column search row allows quick filtering by substring. Showing it will let us type “#SERIES-f9d328e8-a” under Short description.

action_text: Right-click the Short description cell that contains “#SERIES-f9d328e8-a”
rationale: Context-clicking a cell with the target token may expose “Show Matching”/“Filter Out” options, providing an alternate path to filtering relevant rows.

action_text: Toggle the natural language filter bar
rationale: If the standard builder is finicky, the natural language filter can quickly create the needed condition; enabling it prepares for typing the NLQ.
